name: List
description: Single-select picker List variant. Each row carries a leading 16px radio indicator; clicking any row commits its value via `onChange(value)`. Exactly one row is selected at a time (or zero before the user picks). Use inside picker sheets, settings rows, sort-by menus.

embedded.description: Composition mode flag. When `true` (or when the List is a direct child of `.chorus-section` / `.chorus-feed`), enters **embedded mode**: zeroes its own `background` + `padding` so chrome defers to the host. Pass explicitly inside `<Section>` / `<Feed>` for the contract to be visible in JSX; the DOM-ancestry safety net in styles.css also activates the mode when omitted. See `compositionModes` in `list.family.json`.

onChange.description: Commits the next value when a row is selected.

container.description: Outer scroll surface. Vertical stack with a transparent fill (inherits parent container tone); rows separated by a 1px outlineVariant divider, not a gap.

row.description: Single list item. Whole row is the interactive target.

leading.description: 16px radio indicator — `RadioIcon` at rest, `RadioFillIcon` when selected. Decorative — keyboard focus and click target both sit on the row.

label.description: Primary row text. 16px / Regular / onSurface. Single line; truncates with ellipsis.

supportingText.description: Secondary line under label. 14px / Regular / onSurfaceVariant, sits directly under the label with no extra gap.

strong.description: Per-row label-emphasis opt-in (family-wide contract — see [list.md § Cross-sub contract](./list.md)). When `true`, the row's label weight promotes from `body.md` Regular (400) to `label.lg` Semibold (600) at the same 16px size and 1.5 line-height — geometry stays identical, only the glyph stroke thickens. Use sparingly to mark one primary row inside a denser scan; a stack where every row is `strong` defeats the marker.

forcedState.description: Docs-only — pins the row to a single visual state via `data-force-state`. Not for production use.

selected.leading: Filled primary indicator; row foreground stays at onSurface. No fill change on the row itself.

disabled.note: Radio indicator dims with the row.

focusIndicator.description: Keyboard-focus visual — an accessibility indicator, not a lifecycle state. The ring sits on the row, not on the leading indicator — the row is the keyboard target.
focusIndicator.compositionReason: Rows tile the column flush with only a hairline `outlineVariant` divider between them; an outward ring would overlap the divider and the neighbouring row.

ring.outerLayerPosition: depth 0..2px from the row edge (the outer stroke)
ring.insetLayerPosition: depth 2..3px from the row edge (the counter-ring just inside the outer stroke)
ring.implementation: inset box-shadow on the row's `::before` overlay (the `::after` carries the inter-row divider). Constrained strictly inside the row's footprint and never exceeds it.

focusIndicator.trigger: :focus-visible (keyboard / programmatic focus, never plain mouse click)

behavior.keyboardNavigation: Arrow up/down moves focus between rows. Space and Enter commit the focused row's value. Home and End jump to first / last.
behavior.selectionModel: Single-select only; selecting a row implicitly deselects the previously selected. Controlled — pass `value` and `onChange`; uncontrolled use defaults to no selection.
behavior.rowClickTarget: Whole row is clickable. The leading indicator is never a separate hit target.
behavior.truncationNotWrap: Both label and supportingText truncate; the row never grows to fit long text.

forbidden: radio glyph as a separate hit area — the entire row is the click target
multi-select painted as radio — radio variant is single-select; use checkbox or chip/filter for multi-select
selected state painted with sys.color.primaryContainer fill — radio selected paints the inner dot, not the row fill
